properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I don't want anything but You, You're more than every dream come true, All of the things I thought I wanted, Don't come close to knowing You,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now that I'm Yours and You are mine, Our love is the secret that I find, I'll spend forever in the pleasure, I found looking in Your eyes,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Give me Jesus, Give me Jesus, You can have all this world, You can have all this world.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than silver, more than gold, You are the treasure that I hold, Now that I've tasted of Your goodness, Nothing else will satisfy.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Just give me Jesus, Give me Jesus, And you can have all this world, You can have all this world, Give me Jesus, Give me Jesus.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And you can have all this world You can have all this world Just give me Jesus

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I only want Jesus, I only want Jesus, I only want Jesus, I don't want anyone else, I don't need anything else.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You are my one thing, You are my one thing.
